printed.name: Prances
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight and parallel, toes placed on footbar at hip width apart and plantarflexed

movement.inhale: Lower one heel and lift other simultaneously, switch
movement.exhale: Lower one heel and lift other simutaneously, switch

cues: Work both feet equally in full range of motion
Straighten legs and plantarflex feet completely between each repetition
